item.title: Argentina: Floods - Mar 2025
item.description:
Affected country: Argentina
Glide: FL-2025-000040-ARG

Torrential rains hit the city of Bahía Blanca in Buenos Aires province, causing widespread flooding.

item.title: Ecuador: Floods - Mar 2025
item.description:
Affected country: Ecuador
Glide: FL-2025-000032-ECU

Heavy rains associated with the rainy season have caused floods across coastal provinces of Ecuador, affecting thousands of families.
